markdown:
#  Edit a Purchase Order (iOS) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Admin' level permissions on the project's Commitments tool.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * This action can be performed in offline mode if the asset/item was previously viewed and cached on your mobile device. Tasks performed in offline mode will sync with Procore once a network connection is reestablished.


##  Prerequisites 
  * [Create a Purchase Order (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-ios/tutorials/create-a-purchase-order-ios)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Commitments** tool using the Procore app on an iOS mobile device.
  2. Tap **Purchase Orders**.
  3. Tap the purchase order you want to edit.
  4. Tap **Edit**.
  5. Tap into a field to modify information. For a list of fields and their descriptions, see [Create a Purchase Order (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-ios/tutorials/create-a-purchase-order-ios).
  6. Tap **Save**.


## See Also
  * [Edit a Commitment's Schedule of Values (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-ios/tutorials/edit-a-commitments-schedule-of-values-ios)
  * [Which Procore tools support Work Breakdown Structure?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-which-procore-tools-support-work-breakdown-structure)
  * [Commitments (iOS) - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-ios/permissions)
title: Edit a Purchase Order (iOS)
description: How to edit a purchase order in the project's Commitments tool using the Procore app on an iOS mobile device.
